generated_oml:

instance TwinSensingComponent : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Captures real-time sensor data for the digital twin"

]

    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TwinSensingComponent
]

    base:desc "Serialized sensor measurements for processing"

]

]

]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle follows the MBSE abstraction hierarchy: beginning with the requirements level, proceeding through functional architecture, logical architecture, and culminating in the product/technical layer representation. Transition management between phases is facilitated by parallel conceptual models, such as RFLP, which help map requirements to physics‑based representations. Governance of the lifecycle is anchored by the use of SysML for modeling, with validation at each level via state machine automata or MontiArc automaton models. Additionally, the digital twin evolves from the passive digital shadow (one‑way data flow) to an active simulation or decision support tool through intentional transition management steps."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The document does not reference any specific industry standards, certifications, compliance frameworks, or interoperability standards applicable to the Digital Twin or Digital Shadow. Consequently, no standardization information is available."
]
